title: Support Ticket
description: One support ticket: the conversation and its status.

steps.title: The conversation
steps.description: Your message and every reply, in order.
steps.voiceScript: This ticket shows your message and every reply in order.
steps.captionText: This ticket shows your message and every reply in order.
steps.fallbackMessage: The conversation: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Add a reply
steps.description: Keep the thread going until it is resolved.
steps.voiceScript: Add a reply to keep the thread going until it is resolved.
steps.captionText: Add a reply to keep the thread going until it is resolved.
steps.fallbackMessage: Add a reply: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Status
steps.description: Open, pending or resolved, tracked here.
steps.voiceScript: The status tracks whether the ticket is open, pending or resolved.
steps.captionText: The status tracks whether the ticket is open, pending or resolved.
steps.fallbackMessage: Status: not visible on this screen yet.
